key.name: plan-type
key.description: Claude subscription plan: "pro", "max5", or "max20". Used to calculate usage percentages against plan limits.

key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often the indicator refreshes token data from disk.

key.name: panel-position
key.description: Which side of the top panel to place the indicator: "left" or "right".

key.name: show-prefix
key.description: Whether to show the word "Claude" before the progress bar.

key.name: prefix-style
key.description: How to show the Claude prefix: "text" for the word, "icon" for the Claude logo, "symbolic" for theme-adaptive symbolic icon.

key.name: bar-length
key.description: Number of segments in the progress bar (5-30).

key.name: bar-style
key.description: Visual style for the bar: "blocks", "smooth", "dots", "squares", "thin", "pill", "thick-rounded", "segmented", "glow-edge", "vbar", "vbar-dual".

key.name: bar-metric
key.description: What the bar represents: "cost" or "tokens".

key.name: bar-color
key.description: Color scheme for the progress bar: "white", "green-red", "blue", "purple", "amber", "rainbow", "dracula", "nord", "catppuccin", "neon", "sunset", "ocean", "solarized", "accent", "custom".

key.name: time-display
key.description: What time info to show in the panel: "none" (nothing), "remaining" (time until plan limit exhausted), or "reset" (countdown until 5h window resets).

key.name: estimation-mode
key.description: How aggressively to estimate usage. "conservative" shows raw calculated values, "balanced" applies a small correction factor to approximate /usage, "generous" adds extra margin for safety.

key.name: show-icon
key.description: Whether to show the Claude icon in the panel indicator.

key.name: show-bar
key.description: Whether to show the progress bar in the panel indicator.

key.name: show-percentage
key.description: Whether to show the usage percentage in the panel indicator.

key.name: show-time
key.description: Whether to show time information (remaining or reset countdown) in the panel indicator.

key.name: show-status-dot
key.description: Whether to show a colored status dot indicating usage level (green/yellow/red).

key.name: show-status-badge
key.description: Whether to show a small colored dot overlay on the icon indicating usage level.

key.name: pill-background
key.description: Background style for the panel button: "off" (transparent), "solid" (visible pill), "subtle" (semi-transparent), "border-only" (outline only), "status" (color changes with usage), "glow" (purple neon glow).

key.name: dropdown-style
key.description: Style for the click-to-expand dropdown: "classic" (simple text rows), "modern" (progress bar, colored dots, icons, plan badge), or "gauges" (circular arc gauges).

key.name: font-size
key.description: Panel text size: "small" (10px), "medium" (12px), "large" (14px).

key.name: text-effect
key.description: Text visual effect: "none", "glow" (bright vivid color), "shadow" (dimmer text).

key.name: enable-pulse
key.description: Whether to pulse/flicker the panel indicator at high usage levels.

key.name: pulse-threshold
key.description: Usage percentage at which the pulse animation activates (50-100).

key.name: element-order
key.description: Comma-separated order of panel elements: icon, label, bar, dot. Controls the left-to-right arrangement.

key.name: data-source
key.description: Where to read usage data: "local" (JSONL files) or "api" (Claude.ai API).

key.name: session-key
key.description: Value of the sessionKey cookie from claude.ai, used to authenticate API requests.

key.name: auto-read-browser
key.description: Automatically read the sessionKey cookie from Google Chrome instead of using a manually entered value.

key.name: org-id
key.description: Claude.ai organization UUID, found in the usage API URL.

key.name: custom-color-start
key.description: Start color for custom gradient bar color scheme (hex format).

key.name: custom-color-end
key.description: End color for custom gradient bar color scheme (hex format).
